settings.text: Assistance with the application, administration inquiries, compliance with regulatory and legislative requirements.

settings.head: Highly Qualified Experts
settings.text: Our experts are from the training and education industry, with Diploma of Quality auditing, Certificate IV TAE and solid industry experience.

settings.head: One Stop Shop
settings.text: We offer all services a training organisation may require from RTO consultancy, resource writing, validation and moderation, industry consultancy, training and assessment resources, e-commerce and online training solutions, recruitment and staff training services.

settings.head: Industry Leaders
settings.text: Our experts can deliver compliance and audit training, professional development sessions, webinars, and CEO training sessions audit training since 1998.

settings.head: Welcome to CAQA
settings.text:
We are a team of dedicated and seasoned professionals with an exceptional success record. Our consultants have worked with VET regulators, Government bodies, TAFEs, not for profits and private training organisations. We have all experienced the changes that have occurred in the education and training landscape over the last 25 years. We have helped organisations across Australia with audits, compliance support, training and assessment resources, administrative and recruitment needs.

Our commitment is to provide our clients with ethical and fair advice, support when they need it and to develop their understanding of the requirements of regulatory and licensing bodies. Our focus is to make your organisation a successful and compliant business. We offer cost-effective solutions and customised support.

settings.head: Featured RTO Resources
settings.text: All RTO resources & training material we provide can be customised and edited to meet your RTO’s needs.

Join Our Exclusive Q&A Session on RTO Operations and More!
settings.subhead: RTO Question Hour: Expert Talk with Sukh Sandhu, Michelle Newman and Patrick Satapara
settings.text: At CAQA, we understand that running a Registered Training Organisation (RTO) involves numerous facets, from operations and marketing to compliance and student support. You may have burning questions or need some insights into these critical areas. That's why we are excited to invite you to our upcoming event:

settings.head: How CAQA Can Help!
settings.text: A successful organisation requires all its departments to resources such as people and training and assessment materials to work according to legislative and regulatory standards, having VET educated, student focused and strong leadership, everyone following a calculated risk management approach, adaption to the opportunities and changes. This is where you will need industry experts that have developed training organisations from scratch, run the education and training businesses and worked as trainers and assessors, validators, high managerial agents to provide you support and assistance and show you how you can also become a successful training provider.

settings.head: Quality 100% Our Guarantee
settings.text:
We guarantee that, should any of our products give you a non-compliant outcome* we will make the required rectifications free of charge. ​

*​Must be an audit conducted by a registering body. Only applicable where outcome is not influenced by changes made after purchase.
